_comment: Curated version-to-CVE mapping for pfSense CE. Maintained manually, no live network lookup (see docs/specs/fase12-operacao-manutencao.md sec 2: review this file monthly against the NVD feed / Netgate security advisories). Keys are pfsense_version strings as reported by the agent; values are lists of known CVEs affecting that exact version. Entries below are verified against nvd.nist.gov, not placeholders.

2.4.4-RELEASE.description: Authenticated command injection in pfSense CE 2.4.4-RELEASE via the powerd_normal_mode POST parameter.

2.4.4_1.description: pfSense 2.4.4_1 expiretable block duration configuration incompatibility allows bypass of sshguard blocking restrictions.
